---
title: "Resolución TP2"
author: "Palmer, Candela. Gesualdi, Santiago."
date: "2026-06-18"
output: html_document
---


```{r setup, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE, echo = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE, fig.pos = "H", fig.align = "center")
options(scipen = 999)

library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
library(glue)

library(ggplot2)
library(scales)
library(ComplexUpset)
library(knitr)
options(kableExtra.latex.load_packages = FALSE) 
library(kableExtra)
library(paletteer)

```

```{r}
datos <- read.csv("datosTP2_2026.csv", na.strings = c("NA", ""), stringsAsFactors = TRUE)
```

```{r}
datos %>%
  #Devuelve una fila con el porcentaje de NA de cada columna
  summarise(across(everything(), ~ mean(is.na(.)))) %>% 
  #Lo pasa a Variable | prop_na
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "variable", values_to = "prop_na") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(variable, prop_na), y = prop_na)) +
  
  #Genero las columnas, les pongo un puntito al final y el respectivo porcentaje que refiere
  geom_col(fill = "#8da0cb", width = 0.3,alpha=0.5) +
  geom_point(color = "#2c3e50", size = 2.5) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = percent(prop_na, accuracy = 0.1)), 
    hjust = -0.3, size = 3.5, color = "#2C3E50", fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  
  #Las doy vuelta  y les acomodo el formato
  coord_flip() +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = percent_format(), 
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.15))
  ) +
  labs(
    y = "Porcentaje de Datos Faltantes (NA)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 11, color = "#4A4A4A"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold", color = "#2C3E50"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14, color = "#1D3557", margin = margin(b = 8)),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 11, color = "#6C7A89", margin = margin(b = 20)),
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    plot.margin = margin(t = 20, r = 20, b = 20, l = 20) 
  )

datos_sin_na <- drop_na(data = datos)
```


```{r}
summary(datos)
```
